docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF APR-27-2023 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF APR-27-2023 BY JUDGE PRO TEM LY. PLAINTIFF MICHELLE MA IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MOXIE INSTITUTE IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: PANG LY; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MA, MICHELLE MQM CAPITAL RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOXIE INSTITUTE $3,106.25 PRINCIPAL, $65.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,171.25, PLEASE SEE ATTACHED STATEMENT OF DECISION. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
